name: Spinach-Stuffed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Freshly Grated Parmesan or Romano
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Pierce each potato in two or three places with a fork.
3. Rub potatoes lightly with olive oil.
4. Arrange the potatoes in a circle with the thickest parts to the outside, and cook on high power for 10 minutes, turning them every 3 minutes until they begin to whistle.
5. Bake in oven for 15-20 minutes until easily pierced with a fork (or bake for 45-60 minutes at 375 degrees F).
6. While the potatoes are baking, saute the onion in a few drops of olive oil until soft. Add the spinach and saute about 30 seconds until soft.
7. Remove from heat and mix in a bowl with the salt, pepper, and buttermilk (if using frozen, stir into onions and remove from heat).
8. Cut potatoes lengthwise and scoop out flesh with a spoon.
9. Add to the spinach/buttermilk mixture and mash together with a fork.
10. Arrange skins on a cookie sheet and spoon the mixture into the skins. Sprinkle with grated cheese and cayenne pepper.
11. Return to oven for about 20 minutes at 375 degrees F.
